final_prompt.prompt:
Create a still-life photograph of a rustic ceramic vase with dried branches on a weathered wooden table.

Style/medium: needs a "侘寂" (wabi-sabi) aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition:

Scene/backdrop: must include a weathered wooden table with natural window light streaming in diagonally
Lighting/mood: needs a natural-light atmosphere emphasizing imperfection and traces of time — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: needs a weathered, imperfect surface treatment — exact grain / patina / texture level is yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints:
